request.prompt: 为传统寓言《铁杵磨针》设计一版从零开始的中文分层纸片动画概念。不要复用旧项目。时长和幕数均由故事节拍推导。必须把李白遇见老妇磨铁杵写成后世传说而非确定史实，并包含旁白草案、六幕分镜、分层与镜头运动、资产清单、风格方向、声音方向和事实边界。

Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: representative 16:9 style sample for a layered paper-collage animation
Primary request: the traditional Chinese legend of Iron Pestle Ground into a Needle, at the creek encounter; an elderly woman on the right steadily grinding a thick iron pestle across a flat stone, a young scholar Li Bai on the left stopping with a book bundle and watching with surprise
Scene/backdrop: mountain creek beneath bamboo and weathered rocks, generalized Tang-era rural setting interpreted through a Song-dynasty album-page composition; no buildings or modern objects
Subject: both figures shown clearly and completely; the woman is calm and focused, the young scholar is curious rather than comedic; the pestle, hands and grindstone are visibly readable
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, hand-torn fibrous paper edges, layered cut-paper silhouettes, restrained ink outlines, mineral pigments, subtle misregistration print texture, dimensional paper shadows; refined editorial animation art, not plastic cartoon and not photorealistic
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 establishing shot; a clean foreground reed-and-grass band occupies only the bottom 18 percent without overlapping either figure; a horizontal creek-water band remains visible across the lower middle for parallax; distant mountain and bamboo layers read separately; keep breathing room around the figures and a calm open upper area
Lighting/mood: late-afternoon natural light; cool celadon, muted teal and tea-brown in the distance, warming to ochre and restrained gold near the grinding stone; patient, contemplative mood
Materials/textures: visible mulberry-paper fibers, deckled edges, lightly embossed paper, matte pigments, tiny gold-paper sparks only at the contact point
Constraints: period-plausible clothing and props; stable human anatomy; complete hands and feet; no finished needle; no written characters; no captions; no signs; no watermark; no logos; no modern items; no extra people; no frame or mockup border
Avoid: glossy 3D, anime, chibi, photorealism, cinematic lens flare, crowded scenery, distorted iron pestle, severed limbs, text-like marks

request.text: 溪边，李白忍不住问：这么粗的铁杵，要磨成什么？老婆婆抬起头，平静地说：磨成一根针。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、沉静、不说教，像在溪边讲述古老寓言；问句带轻微好奇，回答平静笃定，停顿自然

request.text: 相传，少年李白在象耳山中读书。艰深的文字像高山压在眼前。他一时气馁，收起书卷，转身下山。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、沉静、不说教，像讲述古老寓言；开头保留相传的审慎，气馁处克制，不煽情，停顿自然

request.text: 山风吹乱竹叶，也吹乱了他的心。走到溪边，一阵沙沙的声音让他停下脚步。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、沉静、不说教；前半轻微游移，听到沙沙声后自然收住，留一点好奇和空间感

request.text: 老婆婆坐在磨石旁，磨着粗重的铁杵。李白问：这么粗的铁杵，要磨成什么？她说：磨成一根针。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、沉静、不说教；叙述从容，李白问句带轻微好奇，老婆婆回答平静笃定，问答之间停顿清楚

request.text: 铁杵划过石面，一次，又一次。它没有立刻变细，可每一次摩擦，都让目标靠近一点。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、沉静、不说教；一次、又一次要有清楚而克制的节奏落点，后半平稳笃定，不做励志演讲

request.text: 李白望着铁杵，想起没读完的书。他明白，本领也在日复一日的练习里，一点一点磨出来。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、沉静、不说教；像一个想法慢慢清晰，明白处略暖但不突然拔高，一点一点自然放慢

request.text: 他重新背起书卷，回到山中。难懂的一页再读一遍，写不好的字再写一遍。铁杵磨亮的，是坚持的方向。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、沉静、不说教；回到山中要平实坚定，两个再一遍形成柔和重复，结句留有余韵而不是口号

Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: 2×1 close-up action-parts sheet for scene 4 of a layered Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; match the elderly woman's muted ochre sleeves, aged hands, thick iron pestle and exact handmade paper language
Primary request: two complete isolated close-up action phases, one per horizontal cell. In each cell, both elderly hands grip the upper and middle part of ONE thick iron pestle. The shaft slopes downward at a shallow 20–30 degree diagonal. ONLY THE LOWER END touches a small flat grindstone patch at the bottom of the cutout; every other part of the shaft is visibly raised. Cell 2 advances the hands and pestle a short distance ALONG THE SHAFT AXIS, showing the next phase of a lengthwise push-pull stroke while the same tip remains the sole abrasion point. Show a subtle flattened-to-tapered wear shape at that contacted tip, still much thicker than a needle.
Action mechanics: axial back-and-forth rubbing of one end against stone to make that end gradually pointed. The hands do not roll the pestle around its circumference.
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, fibrous torn edges, restrained ink, matte iron gray and ochre mineral pigments
Composition/framing: exact 2 columns × 1 row, consistent hand anatomy and pestle thickness, generous padding, no overlap, complete wrists and fingers; keep the tip-to-stone contact readable
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background in both cells, no floor, cast shadow, gradient, texture or divider outside the small stone contact patch
Constraints: the rod must not lie flat; only one end touches stone; no finished needle, sparks, text, label, watermark, logo, extra limbs or #ff00ff in subject
Avoid: horizontal rod resting across the stone, one hand at each rod end, sideways rolling, polishing the full cylindrical surface, sawing motion, distorted fingers, warped pestle, photorealism, glossy 3D, cropped hands, motion blur

Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: 3×1 character pose sheet for a layered Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; preserve the elderly woman on its right as the exact identity, lined calm face, gray wrapped hair, muted ochre-brown layered robe and paper-collage construction
Primary request: three complete poses of the same elderly woman, one per equal horizontal cell. Cell 1: seated low, both hands spaced along the upper half of one thick iron pestle, holding its shaft at a shallow downward diagonal so ONLY ONE END presses against a small flat grindstone patch below; the rest of the pestle is visibly lifted off the surface. Cell 2: seated upright and answering calmly, one hand still steadying the correctly angled pestle whose same lower tip rests on a small flat stone patch. Cell 3: a second grinding phase of Cell 1, hands and shaft shifted slightly forward ALONG THE PESTLE'S LONG AXIS while the SAME SINGLE END remains the contact point on the same kind of small flat grindstone. The contacted end may be mildly worn and tapered but is still far from a needle.
Action mechanics: she repeatedly pushes and pulls the pestle lengthwise to abrade one end into a point. This is axial back-and-forth rubbing of one tip, never rolling the whole cylinder sideways.
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage matching Image 1, torn fibrous edges, restrained ink, matte mineral pigments and subtle paper shadows
